summary: Comprehensive testing of Birthday/Anniversary Greeting Templates System. Backend: 20/20 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified - templates page loads with 15 seeded templates (8 birthday, 7 anniversary), CRUD operations work, preview modal shows sample name substitution, Greetings sidebar link visible, and Reminders page correctly hides 'Mark as Complete' button for birthday/anniversary items.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility improvement needed

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/greeting-templates returns all 15 seeded templates with correct structure
POST /api/greeting-templates creates templates with type, message, image_url, is_active fields
PUT /api/greeting-templates/{id} updates message, type, image_url, is_active fields
Frontend GreetingTemplates.jsx has all required elements: tabs (Birthday/Anniversary/Sent Log), stats cards, template cards with toggle switches
Add/Edit modal has type selector, message textarea, image_url input, is_active toggle
Preview modal correctly substitutes {customer_name} with 'Dr. John Smith' and {company_name} with 'VMP Distributors'
Reminders.jsx line 244: correctly hides Mark Complete button for birthday/anniversary type reminders
Layout.jsx line 45: Greetings sidebar link added with Gift icon, using 'reminders' permission
seed_data_creation: 15 greeting templates auto-seeded on startup (8 birthday, 7 anniversary)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Birthday/Anniversary Greeting Templates System fully tested. API endpoints: GET/POST /api/greeting-templates, PUT/DELETE /api/greeting-templates/{id}, GET /api/greeting-logs. Frontend page at /admin/greeting-templates. Background task 'send_birthday_anniversary_greetings' runs at 10 AM IST (4:30 AM UTC) - cannot be tested in real-time. Templates use {customer_name} and {company_name} placeholders. Reminders page at /admin/reminders correctly hides 'Mark as Complete' for birthday/anniversary type reminders.

tests: Template structure includes id, type, message, is_active, image_url
Filter by type query parameter works
Creates birthday template with all fields

verified: Stats cards: Total Templates (15), Active (15), Birthday (8), Anniversary (7)
Each template card has: type badge, active badge, message preview, toggle switch, edit/delete/preview buttons
Opens via edit icon on template card
Shows message with sample substitution: {customer_name} -> 'Dr. John Smith', {company_name} -> 'VMP Distributors'
Shows 'WhatsApp message preview (sample names used)' note
Greetings link visible in sidebar with Gift icon
Birthday reminders do NOT have 'Mark as Complete' button
Anniversary reminders do NOT have 'Mark as Complete' button
Follow-up reminders DO have 'Mark as Complete' button
Custom reminders DO have 'Mark as Complete' button
Code check: Line 244 in Reminders.jsx implements this correctly

screenshots.greeting_templates_page: Shows 15 templates with stats cards, Birthday (8) tab active, template cards with toggle switches
screenshots.add_template_modal: Shows Add New Template modal with type, message, image URL, active toggle fields
screenshots.preview_modal: Shows Template Preview with sample name substitution (Dr. John Smith, VMP Distributors)
screenshots.reminders_page: Shows Birthday row without Mark Complete button, Follow-up rows with Mark Complete button
